commands.review_summary:
This PR changes macOS GatewayEndpointStore so local gateway.auth token/password SecretRef dictionaries resolve through a keychain-backed SecretInputResolver and adds Swift tests for resolver and localConfig paths.

PR surface: Other +333. Total +333 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main's macOS browser-proxy endpoint uses localConfig, and localConfig only reads gateway.auth.token/password as strings. I did not run a live macOS/keychain reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is needed because contributor real behavior proof is missing and the remaining blockers include an auth fallback policy choice, an availability fix, and rebase/CI refresh.
